title: GTM Engineer
description_text: Building modern pipeline for RevOps using n8n, Clay, Salesforce. We are looking for an agentic engineer to orchestrate multiple APIs and scrapers to pull and normalize unstructured data. Heavy focus on Python, SQL, and LLMs. You will build autonomous systems to save manual qualification time.

title: ML Engineer
description_text: Looking for ML engineer to deploy LLM pipelines using PyTorch, GCP, and Python. Transformers expertise needed. You will work on HuggingFace embeddings, autonomous systems, and advanced AI agentic workflows in GCP Vertex AI.
